Bash(PSIM_PATH="C:/Altair/Altair_PSIM_2026" PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 py -3.9 -c "
import os, sys
os.environ['PSIM_PATH'] = 'C:/Altair/Altair_PSIM_2026'
sys.path.insert\(0, 'src/psim_mcp/bridge'\)

" 2>&1)

Bash(PSIM_PATH="C:/Altair/Altair_PSIM_2026" PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 PYTHONUTF8=1 py -3.9 -c "
import json, sys, os
os.environ['PSIM_PATH'] = 'C:/Altair/Altair_PSIM_2026'
sys.path.insert\(0, 'src/psim_mcp/bridge'\)
from bridge_script import handle_create_circuit

components = [
    {'id':'V1','type':'DC_Source','psim_element_type':'VDC','ports':[80,80,80,130],'direction':0,'parameters':{'voltage':310}},
    {'id':'GND1','type':'Ground','psim_element_type':'Ground','ports':[80,230],'direction':0,'parameters':{}},
    {'id':'T1','type':'Transformer','psim_element_type':'TF_1F_1','ports':[200,80,200,130,250,130,250,80],'direction':0,'parameters':{'turns_ratio':10.0}},
    {'id':'SW1','type':'MOSFET','psim_element_type':'MULTI_MOSFET','ports':[200,130,200,180,180,160],'direction':0,'parameters':{}},
    {'id':'G1','type':'PWM_Generator','psim_element_type':'GATING','ports':[160,160],'direction':0,'parameters':{'Frequency':100000,'NoOfPoints':2,'Switching_Points':'0,100'}},
    {'id':'D1','type':'Diode','psim_element_type':'MULTI_DIODE','ports':[270,80,320,80],'direction':0,'parameters':{}},
    {'id':'C1','type':'Capacitor','psim_element_type':'MULTI_CAPACITOR','ports':[320,80,320,130],'direction':90,'parameters':{'capacitance':0.00005}},
    {'id':'R1','type':'Resistor','psim_element_type':'MULTI_RESISTOR','ports':[370,80,370,130],'direction':90,'parameters':{'resistance':6,'VoltageFlag':1}},
]

connections = [
    {'from':'V1.positive','to':'T1.primary1'},
    {'from':'T1.primary2','to':'SW1.drain'},
    {'from':'G1.output','to':'SW1.gate'},
    {'from':'T1.secondary2','to':'D1.anode'},
    {'from':'D1.cathode','to':'C1.positive'},
    {'from':'C1.positive','to':'R1.pin1'},
    {'from':'V1.negative','to':'GND1.pin1'},
    {'from':'SW1.source','to':'GND1.pin1'},
    {'from':'T1.secondary1','to':'C1.negative'},
    {'from':'C1.negative','to':'R1.pin2'},
]

result = handle_create_circuit\({
    'circuit_type':'flyback',
    'components':components,
    'connections':connections,
    'save_path':'C:/Users/new92/psim-mcp/output/flyback_bridge_test.psimsch',
}\)
print\(json.dumps\(result, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PSIM_PATH="C:/Altair/Altair_PSIM_2026" PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 py -3.9 -c "
from psimapipy import PSIM
import os
os.environ['PSIM_PATH'] = 'C:/Altair/Altair_PSIM_2026'
p = PSIM\('C:/Altair/Altair_PSIM_2026'\)
sch = p.PsimFileOpen\('C:/Users/new92/psim-mcp/output/FINAL_llc.psimsch'\)
sim = p.PsimSimulate\(sch, 'C:/Users/new92/psim-mcp/output/FINAL_llc.smv', Simview=1\)
print\('LLC opened in PSIM Simview'\)
" 2>&1)
